title: zornia muriculata
intro: Zornia muriculata is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the rough zornia or hairy zornia. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. The health benefits of Zornia muriculata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
